description: Travel: booking confirmation has basic flight info, itinerary update adds gate and terminal details

actual.title: Flight to Seattle - UA 1847
actual.description: United Airlines flight 1847. Confirmation #ABC123. Seat 12A. Boarding starts 7:00am at Gate 75. TSA PreCheck available. Mobile boarding pass ready. Arrive 90min early for international connections.

content_parts.text:
You are merging calendar event data from multiple emails.

**Existing Event:**
- Title: Flight to Seattle - UA 1847
- Start: 2026-06-08T07:30:00
- End: 2026-06-08T10:15:00
- All Day: False
- Location: SFO → SEA
- Description: United Airlines flight 1847. Confirmation #ABC123. Seat 12A.
- Importance: action_required

**New Information (source type: update):**
- Title: Flight to Seattle - UA 1847
- Start: 2026-06-08T07:30:00
- End: 2026-06-08T10:15:00
- All Day: False
- Location: SFO Terminal 3, Gate 75 → SEA
- Description: Boarding starts 7:00am at Gate 75. TSA PreCheck available. Mobile boarding pass ready. Arrive 90min early for international connections.
- Importance: action_required

**Merge Rules:**
1. If source_type is "cancellation", prefix title with "CANCELLED: " (if not already)
2. Prefer specific time (e.g., 6-7pm) over all-day
3. Combine descriptions, keeping all relevant info (append new info)
4. Use most specific location (longer address usually better)
5. Keep newer times if they differ (updates)
6. For importance: keep the highest level (action_required > fyi)

Output JSON with merged event data:
{
    "title": "...",
    "start_datetime": "...",
    "end_datetime": "...",
    "all_day": true/false,
    "location": "...",
    "description": "...",
    "importance": "action_required" or "fyi"
}
